## Decision per backlog spec

Per W22-INSPECTION-BACKLOG.md Probe D decision criteria:
- ✅ Front size median ≥ 5 → DM has enough choices; problem isn't front sparsity
- Probe D rules OUT trivial-front DM scenario → AMFC analysis (Probe C) becomes meaningful
